description: Accounts on recto, with many figures expressed in Hebrew and Coptic alphanumerals. Medieval-era. The entries are organized by individual people: "from Yosef," "from al-Ḥajj ..[?]", etc. Requires further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
